form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months scored a big 3.5 len win at this track March 29 over 1700m on a heavy track defeating Zaroon with 63kg at $7.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 10 at Cologne on May 18 over 1850m, 3.5 len behind Mister Chi with 60.5kg at $2.40. Great chance to make it two in a row. Improver with winning prospects.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 35 day let-up. At the latest run 3rd in a small field at Dortmund on March 8 over 1700m, 3 len behind Ostseesonne carrying 59.5kg at $3.10. The run before that won by 3 len at Dortmund February 1 over 1200m defeating Tiffany Twisted carrying 61.5kg at $8.20. Expected to go well.
